title: Waitzia nitida
taxonomy: Waitzia nitida is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Australia. This plant is part of the genus Waitzia, which is a group of plants closely related to the daisy family. The exact classification and relationships within the Waitzia genus are still being studied and refined by botanists. Waitzia nitida's classification is likely to undergo further revisions as new research becomes available.
